DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Page title and subject display name.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional authored documentation source display name.
This writes DocumentationSubject, DocumentationNarrative, and DocumentationViewNode rows.
It is meant for the durable authored spine around generated reference facts.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Assembly that exposes a public static CliAppDefinition factory method.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Fully qualified type name containing the factory method.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional. Public static factory method name. Default: CreateAppDefinition.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional rendered group name, for example meta-bi.
CLI facts are refreshed from the definition assembly.
Authored narratives in the MetaDocs workspace are preserved where matching subjects still exist.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Existing MetaDocs workspace that already contains imported CLI subjects.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Markdown file or directory to scan for command prose.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional stable documentation source id for imported markdown prose.
Markdown headings are matched to CLI application and command names.
Imported prose is stored as ImportedMarkdown DocumentationNarrative rows and does not replace Authored narratives.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Source Meta workspace whose model should be documented.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional root subject ordering number. Default: 100.
This imports model structure only: workspace, model, entities, properties, and relationships.
Instance documentation is intentionally separate and opt-in.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Source Meta workspace whose allowed instances should be documented.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional stable documentation source id for imported instance docs.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional source id used by import-workspace-model, for linking instance docs to model docs.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional root subject ordering number. Default: 200.
Default policy imports no instance data.
Entities, properties, and relationships must be explicitly included in the MetaDocs workspace policy.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Source workspace entity name to include.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional property used only as the imported instance display name.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional property used only as the imported instance summary.
This writes modeled MetaDocs policy rows. It does not import instance values by itself.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Property name to import as a generated fact.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Relationship selector, navigation name, or relationship column name.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. MetaDocs workspace to include. Repeat for many workspaces.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Suite workspace to create or replace.
Source ids are preserved. Duplicate default theme/view rows are canonicalized in the suite workspace.
Display names are not used as merge identity.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional. Treat warnings as failing diagnostics.
Validation checks source/documentation references, view references, authored prose review status, duplicate display paths, and modeled theme assets/templates.
Warnings do not fail by default.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Output directory. The merged page is written as docs.html.
The renderer consumes DocumentationSubject, DocumentationFact, DocumentationNarrative, DocumentationView, and modeled theme assets.
Rendered HTML is disposable output, not the durable documentation source.
